title: The Light of Western Stars
writer: Zane Grey, George C. Hull, Lucien Hubbard
actors: Jack Holt, Billie Dove, Noah Beery
plot: Cowhand Gene Stewart (Jack Holt) spends much of his time as a drunk and disorderly "two-gun rowdy", sinking to the depths among the Mexican riffraff (sleeping off a drinking spree in a pig sty) on the Mexico border, until the ranc...
